content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

December 8, 2010


Elizabeth Sholes
sholes@calchurches.org


Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-10-179

Dear Ms. Sholes:

On October 20, 2010 we received via email, from the address listed above, your request
for advice on provisions of the Political Reform Act. Our clerical staff tried twice to contact you
at that email address, since you did not provide a street address or a telephone number. On
November 15, 2010 I sent another inquiry to that email address, requesting a response. On
November 17, having received no response, I sent a follow-up message stating that if we were
unable to establish communication with you within the next ten (10) days, we would close the
file without further action. We now advise you that we have closed this file, and in so doing
have withdrawn your request for written advice.

If you wish to explore your questions further, I urge you to send us a letter with your
street address, or discuss your needs with one of our staff on our advice line, which you can
reach at 1 – 866 – ASK- FPPC. You can speak to our staff from 9:00 – 11:30 and 1:30 – 3:30,
Monday through Thursday.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

[illegible]

Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Commission Counsel

LTW:jgl

sections.question_synthetic: The requestor submitted a question regarding the Political Reform Act, but no specific question text is provided in this document.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC has closed the file and withdrawn the request for written advice due to inability to establish communication with the requestor after multiple attempts.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a withdrawal/declination document with no QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. The substantive question posed by the requestor is not provided in the document text. File was closed due to communication failure rather than substantive analysis.

embedding.summary: This is a withdrawal letter from the FPPC informing Elizabeth Sholes that her request for advice (File No. W-10-179) has been closed and withdrawn due to lack of response after two unsuccessful contact attempts and a follow-up warning notice.
